name: WF-6: Voice Agent API (→ SLNG voice service)

parameters.query:
SELECT
  p.name  AS primary_contact_name,
  p.phone AS primary_contact_phone
FROM attio_people p
WHERE p.company_id = '{{ $json.account_id }}'
ORDER BY p.phone NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ signal: { accountId: $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.account_id, accountName: $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.company_name, contactName: ($json.primary_contact_name || $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.primary_contact_name), toNumber: $json.primary_contact_phone, plan: $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.plan_tier, healthScore: $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.health_score, goal: ($('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.success_metric || $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.executive_summary || 'Churn rescue: understand the issue and retain the account.'), notes: $('Trigger: From WF-4').item.json.call_script } }) }}
